description_long: This object is a whimsical, pumpkin-shaped structure with a segmented orange body and three arched, green metallic legs ending in flat, gray pads, giving it a spider-like appearance. Attached to one side are four bulbous, white cylindrical forms, resembling stylized mushrooms or decorative bulbs, clustered together. The pumpkin's surface is smooth and ribbed, with a small, rectangular metallic patch visible on one side, possibly suggesting a repair or an access panel. The legs are robust and curve outward, providing stability and a playful, animated stance. The object appears to be solid and sturdy, with no visible openings or hollow sections. Its design is playful and imaginative, making it suitable for urban parks or themed playgrounds.
description: A playful, orange pumpkin structure with three green arched legs and a cluster of four white bulbous forms attached to one side. The surface is ribbed and smooth, with a small metallic patch and no visible openings.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is seen from the side, showing the three green legs and the four white bulbous forms separated from the main body.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the orange ribbed pumpkin body and the cluster of white bulbs attached to the top left, with all three legs visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the pumpkin with the white bulbs now on the right, and the metallic patch is visible on the pumpkin's surface.
description_view_3: The front view centers the four white bulbs in front of the pumpkin, with the three green legs symmetrically spread out.
